failedAssertions.reason: End-to-end flow blocked: Proxy cannot establish WebSocket connection to sandbox at 127.0.0.1:9000/9001. Gateway healthy with Z.AI provider (13 identities), auth working, but VM guest sandboxes not responding to health checks. Shell bootstrap and runtime task submission cannot complete.
Proxy routing to healthy VM cannot be verified: VM guests on ports 9000/9001/9002 do not respond to health checks. Firecracker VMs register in ownership registry but guest processes not responding.
Cannot test guest isolation: Firecracker VM guest is not running. No firecracker process found, guest IP (172.2.0.2) unreachable, guest sandbox port not responding.
Cannot verify guest secret absence: Firecracker VM guest is not running. Host-side secrets documented at /var/lib/go-choir/gateway-provider.env for future comparison.

skippedAssertions.reason: Already tested in gateway-http flow group (VAL-GATEWAY-005 rate limiting)

rootCauseAnalysis.issue: Firecracker VM guests boot but do not stay healthy
symptoms: VM ownership records show 'active' state in registry
No firecracker process visible in ps aux
Guest ports (9000, 9001, 9002) do not respond to health checks
Proxy WebSocket dial attempts timeout to 127.0.0.1:9000/9001
vmctl logs show repeated 'health check failed' messages
observed: Firecracker VMs successfully boot initially (journal shows kernel boot messages)
VM config files and epoch tracking work correctly
VM lifecycle (hibernate/resume) functions properly at API level
rootCauseAnalysis.hypothesis: VM guest sandbox process inside Firecracker may be crashing or failing to start after kernel boot. Could be guest image issue, sandbox binary problem, or VM configuration issue.

notes: Node B successfully redeployed to latest commit (cbf0cec) - all services running
Gateway service fully operational with Z.AI provider - all gateway HTTP assertions pass
VM ownership registry and routing API fully functional - 8 of 12 VM assertions pass
All cross-area assertions pass (7/7 after skipping duplicate)
Guest images verified as repo-built from Nix store (bit-for-bit hash match)
Main blocker is Firecracker VM guest health - prevents end-to-end provider flow and guest isolation verification
Host-process fallback mode allows partial functionality but not full VM-isolated validation
